name: Arceus
description: It is described in mythology as the Pokémon that shaped the universe with its 1,000 arms. Born from a cosmic egg before existence was codified.
originLore: Before the first sunrise of the universe, Arceus shaped the continuum with a thousand radiant arms. Every subsequent divine vector — Dialga, Palkia, Giratina — is a shard of that original creation pulse. Its registry remains the master key of the Aetherium Core.

lore.celestialConcordance: When the cosmic gates align with Arceus, a burst of normal energy ripples across the celestial fabrics. Legend says this entity commands the core structures of reality.

quantumResonators.name: Sovereign Aura
quantumResonators.description: Projects a high-frequency field that pacifies local chronal distortions.

quantumResonators.name: Aetherial Synthesis
quantumResonators.description: Harnesses pure normal energy to transmute spatial coordinates.
